---
title: "Temporal confounding analysis"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Temporal confounding analysis

```{r}
# ============================================================
# System / backend setup
# ============================================================
Sys.setenv(OMP_NUM_THREADS = "1")
Sys.setenv(OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS = "1")
Sys.setenv(MKL_NUM_THREADS = "1")
Sys.setenv(STAN_NUM_THREADS = "1")
Sys.setenv(MC_CORES = "1")
Sys.setenv(MAKEFLAGS = "-j1")

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(brms)
  library(loo)
  library(scales)
  library(patchwork)
  library(tidytext)
})

options(mc.cores = 1)

`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x)) y else x

# ============================================================
# Helpers
# ============================================================

ensure_dir <- function(path) {
  dir.create(path, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  path
}

safe_string <- function(x, missing = "Unknown") {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x[is.na(x) | !nzchar(trimws(x))] <- missing
  x
}

clean_label <- function(x) {
  x <- x %>%
    as.character() %>%
    stringr::str_trim() %>%
    stringr::str_to_lower()

  dplyr::case_when(
    x %in% c("christian", "christianity", "c") ~ "christian",
    x %in% c("non_christian", "non-christian", "non christian", "pagan", "nc") ~ "non_christian",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
}

safe_standardize <- function(x) {
  x <- as.numeric(x)
  s <- stats::sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  m <- mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (!is.finite(s) || s <= 0) return(rep(0, length(x)))
  (x - m) / s
}

fast_auc <- function(score, y01) {
  ok <- is.finite(score) & !is.na(y01)
  score <- score[ok]
  y01 <- y01[ok]
  if (length(score) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  n1 <- sum(y01 == 1)
  n0 <- sum(y01 == 0)
  if (n1 == 0 || n0 == 0) return(NA_real_)
  r <- rank(score, ties.method = "average")
  (sum(r[y01 == 1]) - n1 * (n1 + 1) / 2) / (n1 * n0)
}

has_col <- function(df, nm) {
  nm %in% names(df)
}

get_col <- function(df, nm, default = NA) {
  if (has_col(df, nm)) df[[nm]] else rep(default, nrow(df))
}

coalesce_existing <- function(df, cols, default = NA) {
  vals <- lapply(cols, function(nm) get_col(df, nm, default = NA))
  out <- vals[[1]]
  if (length(vals) > 1) {
    for (i in 2:length(vals)) out <- dplyr::coalesce(out, vals[[i]])
  }
  if (length(default) == 1) out[is.na(out)] <- default
  out
}

dedupe_by_id <- function(df, name) {
  if (!("id" %in% names(df))) return(df)
  dup_n <- sum(duplicated(df$id))
  if (dup_n > 0) {
    warning(name, " has ", dup_n, " duplicated ids. Keeping the first row per id.")
    df <- df %>% distinct(id, .keep_all = TRUE)
  }
  df
}

list_candidate_files <- function(search_dirs) {
  search_dirs <- unique(normalizePath(search_dirs[file.exists(search_dirs)], winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE))
  out <- purrr::map(search_dirs, function(d) {
    tibble(
      dir = d,
      path = list.files(d, full.names = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, all.files = FALSE)
    )
  }) %>% bind_rows()
  unique(out$path)
}

find_file_by_pattern <- function(patterns, search_dirs, must_exist = TRUE) {
  files <- list_candidate_files(search_dirs)
  bases <- basename(files)

  for (pat in patterns) {
    hit <- files[stringr::str_detect(bases, pat)]
    if (length(hit) > 0) return(hit[[1]])
  }

  if (isTRUE(must_exist)) {
    stop(
      "Could not find a matching file. Searched directories:\n",
      paste0("  - ", unique(search_dirs), collapse = "\n"),
      call. = FALSE
    )
  }
  NULL
}

read_csv_if_exists <- function(path) {
  if (is.null(path) || !file.exists(path)) return(NULL)
  readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)
}

bind_or_empty <- function(x, template) {
  if (length(x) == 0) return(template)
  dplyr::bind_rows(x)
}

make_formula <- function(rhs_terms = character(), random_term = NULL) {
  rhs_terms <- rhs_terms[!is.na(rhs_terms) & nzchar(rhs_terms)]
  if (!is.null(random_term) && nzchar(random_term)) rhs_terms <- c(rhs_terms, random_term)
  rhs <- if (length(rhs_terms) == 0) "1" else paste(rhs_terms, collapse = " + ")
  brms::bf(stats::as.formula(paste("y ~", rhs)))
}

formula_has_score <- function(model_name) {
  stringr::str_detect(model_name, "score")
}

choose_backend <- function() {
  if (!requireNamespace("cmdstanr", quietly = TRUE)) {
    options(brms.backend = "rstan")
    return("rstan")
  }

  ok <- tryCatch({
    p <- cmdstanr::cmdstan_path()
    if (!nzchar(p)) return(FALSE)
    tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".stan")
    writeLines(
      c(
        "data {int<lower=0> N; vector[N] y;}",
        "parameters {real mu; real<lower=0> sigma;}",
        "model {y ~ normal(mu, sigma);}"
      ),
      tmp
    )
    mod <- cmdstanr::cmdstan_model(tmp, quiet = TRUE)
    inherits(mod, "CmdStanModel")
  }, error = function(e) FALSE)

  if (isTRUE(ok)) {
    options(brms.backend = "cmdstanr")
    "cmdstanr"
  } else {
    options(brms.backend = "rstan")
    "rstan"
  }
}

run_loo_safely <- function(fit) {
  out <- tryCatch(
    suppressWarnings(brms::loo(fit, cores = 1)),
    error = function(e) e
  )

  if (inherits(out, "error")) {
    return(list(
      loo = NULL,
      pareto_k = NULL,
      loo_error = conditionMessage(out)
    ))
  }

  pk <- tryCatch(loo::pareto_k_values(out), error = function(e) NULL)

  list(
    loo = out,
    pareto_k = pk,
    loo_error = NA_character_
  )
}

model_has_score_coef <- function(fit) {
  fe <- tryCatch(brms::fixef(fit), error = function(e) NULL)
  !is.null(fe) && "score_std" %in% rownames(fe)
}

empty_comparison_tbl <- tibble(
  outcome = character(),
  score = character(),
  model = character(),
  elpd_loo = double(),
  elpd_loo_se = double(),
  p_loo = double(),
  looic = double(),
  delta_looic = double(),
  delta_elpd = double(),
  rank = integer()
)

empty_effect_tbl <- tibble(
  outcome = character(),
  score = character(),
  model = character(),
  estimate = double(),
  est_error = double(),
  l95 = double(),
  u95 = double(),
  prob_positive = double(),
  score_coef_present = logical()
)

empty_pareto_tbl <- tibble(
  outcome = character(),
  score = character(),
  model = character(),
  n_k_gt_0_7 = integer(),
  n_k_gt_1_0 = integer(),
  max_k = double(),
  worst_row = integer(),
  worst_id = character()
)

empty_summary_tbl <- tibble(
  outcome = character(),
  score = character(),
  n = integer(),
  n_models_attempted = integer(),
  n_models_fit_ok = integer(),
  n_models_loo_ok = integer(),
  score_sd_raw = double(),
  outcome_sd_raw = double(),
  backend = character(),
  adapt_delta = double(),
  max_treedepth = double()
)

empty_matching_tbl <- tibble(
  outcome = character(),
  n_after_outcome_date_filter = integer(),
  n_common_ids_all_scores = integer()
)

empty_status_tbl <- tibble(
  outcome = character(),
  score = character(),
  model = character(),
  n = integer(),
  fit_ok = logical(),
  loo_ok = logical(),
  score_model = logical(),
  score_coef_present = logical(),
  error_message = character(),
  loo_error_message = character()
)

# ============================================================
# Paths
# ============================================================

search_dirs <- c(
  getwd(),
  ".",
  "..",
  "../..",
  "../../results/predictions/non_transformer_lemmatized/600ad",
  "../../data/processed_texts/600ad",
  "../../data/processed_text/600ad",
  "/mnt/data"
)

pred_path <- find_file_by_pattern(
  patterns = c(
    "^corpus_600ad_model_outputs_oof(?:\\([0-9]+\\))?\\.csv$",
    "model_outputs_oof.*\\.csv$"
  ),
  search_dirs = search_dirs,
  must_exist = TRUE
)

corpus_path <- find_file_by_pattern(
  patterns = c(
    "^corpus_600ad(?:\\([0-9]+\\))?\\.csv$"
  ),
  search_dirs = search_dirs,
  must_exist = FALSE
)

results_dir <- ensure_dir("../../results/predictions/non_transformer_lemmatized/600ad/negative_control")
tables_dir <- ensure_dir(file.path(results_dir, "tables"))
report_dir <- ensure_dir(file.path(results_dir, "report"))
fig_dir <- ensure_dir(file.path(report_dir, "figures"))
tab_dir <- ensure_dir(file.path(report_dir, "tables"))

backend_used <- choose_backend()
message("Using brms backend: ", backend_used)
message("[path] predictions = ", pred_path)
message("[path] corpus      = ", corpus_path %||% "<not found>")

# ============================================================
# Read data
# ============================================================

pred <- readr::read_csv(pred_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
if (!has_col(pred, "id")) pred$id <- seq_len(nrow(pred))
pred <- dedupe_by_id(pred, "Prediction file")

corpus <- read_csv_if_exists(corpus_path)
if (!is.null(corpus)) {
  if (!has_col(corpus, "id")) {
    if (nrow(corpus) == nrow(pred)) {
      corpus$id <- pred$id
    } else {
      stop("Corpus file has no 'id' column and does not match prediction file row count.", call. = FALSE)
    }
  }
  corpus <- dedupe_by_id(corpus, "Corpus file")

  keep <- intersect(
    c("id", "creator", "type", "date_range_start", "date_range_end", "n_words", "n_chars", "manual_label", "prediction_source"),
    names(corpus)
  )

  corpus_small <- corpus %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(keep)) %>%
    dplyr::rename_with(~ paste0(.x, "_corpus"), -id)

  dat <- pred %>% dplyr::left_join(corpus_small, by = "id")
} else {
  dat <- pred
}

data_integrity_tbl <- tibble(
  pred_rows = nrow(pred),
  corpus_rows = if (!is.null(corpus)) nrow(corpus) else NA_integer_,
  merged_rows = nrow(dat),
  pred_unique_ids = dplyr::n_distinct(pred$id),
  merged_unique_ids = dplyr::n_distinct(dat$id)
)

readr::write_csv(data_integrity_tbl, file.path(tables_dir, "data_integrity.csv"))

# ============================================================
# Metadata harmonization
# ============================================================

dat <- dat %>%
  mutate(
    id = as.character(id),
    creator = safe_string(coalesce_existing(., c("creator_corpus", "creator"), default = "Unknown")),
    type = safe_string(coalesce_existing(., c("type_corpus", "type"), default = "Unknown")),
    prediction_source = safe_string(coalesce_existing(., c("prediction_source_corpus", "prediction_source"), default = "Unknown")),
    date_range_start_use = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(coalesce_existing(., c("date_range_start_corpus", "date_range_start"), default = NA_real_))),
    date_range_end_use = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(coalesce_existing(., c("date_range_end_corpus", "date_range_end"), default = NA_real_))),
    date_mid = dplyr::if_else(
      is.finite(date_range_start_use) & is.finite(date_range_end_use),
      (date_range_start_use + date_range_end_use) / 2,
      NA_real_
    ),
    n_words = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(coalesce_existing(., c("n_words_corpus", "n_words"), default = NA_real_))),
    n_chars = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(coalesce_existing(., c("n_chars_corpus", "n_chars"), default = NA_real_))),
    manual_label_clean = clean_label(coalesce_existing(., c("manual_label_corpus", "manual_label"), default = NA_character_))
  )

score_cols <- names(dat)[stringr::str_detect(names(dat), "^score_.*_logit$")]
score_cols <- setdiff(score_cols, stringr::str_subset(names(dat), "_aligned$"))

if (length(score_cols) == 0) stop("No score columns were found.", call. = FALSE)

# ============================================================
# Align scores to the labeled subset
# ============================================================

y01 <- ifelse(dat$manual_label_clean == "christian", 1,
              ifelse(dat$manual_label_clean == "non_christian", 0, NA))

orientation_audit <- purrr::map_dfr(score_cols, function(sc) {
  s <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dat[[sc]]))
  auc_raw <- fast_auc(s, y01)
  flip <- is.finite(auc_raw) && auc_raw < 0.5
  dat[[paste0(sc, "_aligned")]] <<- if (flip) -s else s
  tibble(
    score = sc,
    auc_raw = auc_raw,
    flipped = flip,
    auc_aligned = fast_auc(dat[[paste0(sc, "_aligned")]], y01)
  )
})

score_cols_aligned <- paste0(score_cols, "_aligned")
readr::write_csv(orientation_audit, file.path(tables_dir, "orientation_audit.csv"))

# ============================================================
# Analysis data construction
# ============================================================

make_outcome_base_df <- function(dat, outcome, score_cols_aligned) {
  dat %>%
    transmute(
      id = as.character(id),
      outcome_raw = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[[outcome]])),
      date_mid = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(date_mid)),
      type = safe_string(type, "Unknown"),
      creator = safe_string(creator, "Unknown"),
      prediction_source = safe_string(prediction_source, "Unknown"),
      across(all_of(score_cols_aligned), ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.x)))
    ) %>%
    distinct(id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    filter(
      is.finite(outcome_raw),
      outcome_raw >= 0,
      is.finite(date_mid)
    )
}

make_analysis_df <- function(base_df, score_col) {
  base_df %>%
    transmute(
      id = as.character(id),
      score = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[[score_col]])),
      outcome_raw = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(outcome_raw)),
      date_mid = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(date_mid)),
      type = droplevels(factor(safe_string(type, "Unknown"))),
      creator = droplevels(factor(safe_string(creator, "Unknown"))),
      prediction_source = droplevels(factor(safe_string(prediction_source, "Unknown")))
    ) %>%
    filter(is.finite(score), is.finite(outcome_raw), is.finite(date_mid)) %>%
    mutate(
      y = safe_standardize(log1p(outcome_raw)),
      score_std = safe_standardize(score),
      date_mid_z = safe_standardize(date_mid)
    )
}

build_forms <- function(df) {
  include_type <- dplyr::n_distinct(df$type) >= 2
  include_source <- dplyr::n_distinct(df$prediction_source) >= 2
  creator_tab <- table(df$creator)
  include_creator <- dplyr::n_distinct(df$creator) >= 3 && any(creator_tab >= 2)
  n_unique_dates <- dplyr::n_distinct(df$date_mid_z)
  include_linear_date <- n_unique_dates >= 2
  include_smooth_date <- n_unique_dates >= 5
  k_smooth <- max(3L, min(6L, n_unique_dates - 1L))

  type_term <- if (include_type) "type" else NULL
  source_term <- if (include_source) "prediction_source" else NULL
  creator_term <- if (include_creator) "(1 | creator)" else NULL
  linear_date_term <- if (include_linear_date) "date_mid_z" else NULL
  smooth_date_term <- if (include_smooth_date) paste0("s(date_mid_z, k = ", k_smooth, ")") else NULL

  forms <- list(
    intercept = make_formula(),
    score = make_formula("score_std"),
    date_type = make_formula(c(linear_date_term, type_term)),
    date_type_score = make_formula(c(linear_date_term, type_term, "score_std"))
  )

  if (!is.null(smooth_date_term)) {
    forms$sdate_type <- make_formula(c(smooth_date_term, type_term))
    forms$sdate_type_score <- make_formula(c(smooth_date_term, type_term, "score_std"))
  }

  if (!is.null(source_term)) {
    forms$source_date_type <- make_formula(c(source_term, linear_date_term, type_term))
    forms$source_date_type_score <- make_formula(c(source_term, linear_date_term, type_term, "score_std"))
    if (!is.null(smooth_date_term)) {
      forms$source_sdate_type <- make_formula(c(source_term, smooth_date_term, type_term))
      forms$source_sdate_type_score <- make_formula(c(source_term, smooth_date_term, type_term, "score_std"))
    }
  }

  if (!is.null(creator_term)) {
    forms$creator_date_type <- make_formula(c(linear_date_term, type_term), creator_term)
    forms$creator_date_type_score <- make_formula(c(linear_date_term, type_term, "score_std"), creator_term)
    if (!is.null(smooth_date_term)) {
      forms$creator_sdate_type <- make_formula(c(smooth_date_term, type_term), creator_term)
      forms$creator_sdate_type_score <- make_formula(c(smooth_date_term, type_term, "score_std"), creator_term)
    }
  }

  if (!is.null(source_term) && !is.null(creator_term)) {
    forms$source_creator_date_type <- make_formula(c(source_term, linear_date_term, type_term), creator_term)
    forms$source_creator_date_type_score <- make_formula(c(source_term, linear_date_term, type_term, "score_std"), creator_term)
    if (!is.null(smooth_date_term)) {
      forms$source_creator_sdate_type <- make_formula(c(source_term, smooth_date_term, type_term), creator_term)
      forms$source_creator_sdate_type_score <- make_formula(c(source_term, smooth_date_term, type_term, "score_std"), creator_term)
    }
  }

  forms
}

# ============================================================
# Priors
# ============================================================

get_priors_for_formula <- function(formula_obj) {
  f <- formula_obj$formula
  tl <- attr(stats::terms(f), "term.labels")

  pri <- c(
    brms::prior(student_t(3, 0, 2.5), class = "Intercept"),
    brms::prior(exponential(1), class = "sigma")
  )

  fixed_terms <- tl[!grepl("^s\\(", tl) & !grepl("\\|", tl)]
  if (length(fixed_terms) > 0) {
    pri <- c(pri, brms::prior(normal(0, 1), class = "b"))
  }

  if (any(grepl("^s\\(", tl))) {
    pri <- c(pri, brms::prior(exponential(1), class = "sds"))
  }

  if (any(grepl("\\|", tl))) {
    pri <- c(pri, brms::prior(exponential(1), class = "sd"))
  }

  pri
}

# ============================================================
# Fitting
# ============================================================

fit_one_model <- function(formula_obj, data) {
  pri <- get_priors_for_formula(formula_obj)

  common_args <- list(
    formula = formula_obj,
    data = data,
    family = gaussian(),
    prior = pri,
    chains = 2,
    cores = 1,
    iter = 2000,
    warmup = 1000,
    seed = 1234,
    refresh = 0,
    save_pars = brms::save_pars(all = TRUE),
    control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99, max_treedepth = 12)
  )

  fit <- tryCatch({
    if (identical(getOption("brms.backend"), "cmdstanr")) {
      do.call(
        brms::brm,
        c(common_args, list(
          backend = "cmdstanr",
          threads = brms::threading(1),
          silent = 2
        ))
      )
    } else {
      do.call(
        brms::brm,
        c(common_args, list(
          backend = "rstan",
          init = 0
        ))
      )
    }
  }, error = function(e) e)

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit = NULL,
      loo = NULL,
      pareto_k = NULL,
      error_message = conditionMessage(fit),
      loo_error_message = NA_character_
    ))
  }

  loo_res <- run_loo_safely(fit)

  list(
    fit = fit,
    loo = loo_res$loo,
    pareto_k = loo_res$pareto_k,
    error_message = NA_character_,
    loo_error_message = loo_res$loo_error
  )
}

extract_score_effect <- function(fit, outcome, score_col, model_name) {
  fe <- tryCatch(brms::fixef(fit), error = function(e) NULL)
  has_coef <- !is.null(fe) && "score_std" %in% rownames(fe)

  if (!has_coef) {
    return(tibble(
      outcome = outcome,
      score = score_col,
      model = model_name,
      estimate = NA_real_,
      est_error = NA_real_,
      l95 = NA_real_,
      u95 = NA_real_,
      prob_positive = NA_real_,
      score_coef_present = FALSE
    ))
  }

  draws <- tryCatch(as.data.frame(brms::as_draws_df(fit)), error = function(e) NULL)
  score_draw_col <- if (!is.null(draws)) grep("^b_score_std$", names(draws), value = TRUE) else character(0)
  prob_positive <- if (length(score_draw_col) == 1) mean(draws[[score_draw_col]] > 0) else NA_real_

  tibble(
    outcome = outcome,
    score = score_col,
    model = model_name,
    estimate = unname(fe["score_std", "Estimate"]),
    est_error = unname(fe["score_std", "Est.Error"]),
    l95 = unname(fe["score_std", "Q2.5"]),
    u95 = unname(fe["score_std", "Q97.5"]),
    prob_positive = prob_positive,
    score_coef_present = TRUE
  )
}

compare_models <- function(loos, outcome, score_col) {
  nm <- names(loos)
  if (length(loos) == 0) return(empty_comparison_tbl)

  get_est <- function(l, metric, col) {
    if (is.null(l) || !inherits(l, "loo") || !metric %in% rownames(l$estimates)) return(NA_real_)
    l$estimates[metric, col]
  }

  out <- tibble(
    outcome = outcome,
    score = score_col,
    model = nm,
    elpd_loo = purrr::map_dbl(loos, ~ get_est(.x, "elpd_loo", "Estimate")),
    elpd_loo_se = purrr::map_dbl(loos, ~ get_est(.x, "elpd_loo", "SE")),
    p_loo = purrr::map_dbl(loos, ~ get_est(.x, "p_loo", "Estimate")),
    looic = purrr::map_dbl(loos, ~ get_est(.x, "looic", "Estimate"))
  ) %>%
    filter(!(is.na(looic) & is.na(elpd_loo)))

  if (nrow(out) == 0) return(empty_comparison_tbl)

  out %>%
    arrange(looic) %>%
    mutate(
      delta_looic = if (all(is.na(looic))) NA_real_ else looic - min(looic, na.rm = TRUE),
      delta_elpd = if (all(is.na(elpd_loo))) NA_real_ else elpd_loo - max(elpd_loo, na.rm = TRUE),
      rank = row_number()
    )
}

summarize_pareto_k <- function(pareto_k_list, outcome, score_col, ids = NULL) {
  if (length(pareto_k_list) == 0) return(empty_pareto_tbl)

  purrr::imap_dfr(pareto_k_list, function(pk, model_name) {
    if (is.null(pk) || length(pk) == 0 || all(is.na(pk))) {
      return(tibble(
        outcome = outcome,
        score = score_col,
        model = model_name,
        n_k_gt_0_7 = NA_integer_,
        n_k_gt_1_0 = NA_integer_,
        max_k = NA_real_,
        worst_row = NA_integer_,
        worst_id = NA_character_
      ))
    }

    worst_row <- which.max(pk)

    tibble(
      outcome = outcome,
      score = score_col,
      model = model_name,
      n_k_gt_0_7 = sum(pk > 0.7, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_k_gt_1_0 = sum(pk > 1.0, na.rm = TRUE),
      max_k = max(pk, na.rm = TRUE),
      worst_row = worst_row,
      worst_id = if (!is.null(ids) && length(ids) >= worst_row) as.character(ids[[worst_row]]) else NA_character_
    )
  })
}

# ============================================================
# Run model grid
# ============================================================

all_comparisons <- list()
all_effects <- list()
all_pareto <- list()
summary_rows <- list()
matching_rows <- list()
status_rows <- list()
idx <- 1L
midx <- 1L
sidx <- 1L

for (outcome in c("n_words", "n_chars")) {
  if (!(outcome %in% names(dat))) next

  outcome_base <- make_outcome_base_df(dat, outcome, score_cols_aligned)

  common_ids <- outcome_base %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(score_cols_aligned), is.finite)) %>%
    pull(id)

  base_common <- outcome_base %>%
    filter(id %in% common_ids) %>%
    distinct(id, .keep_all = TRUE)

  matching_rows[[midx]] <- tibble(
    outcome = outcome,
    n_after_outcome_date_filter = nrow(outcome_base),
    n_common_ids_all_scores = length(common_ids)
  )
  midx <- midx + 1L

  if (nrow(base_common) < 40) {
    warning("Skipping outcome ", outcome, " because fewer than 40 ids remain after strict matching across all score columns.")
    next
  }

  for (score_col in score_cols_aligned) {
    if (!(score_col %in% names(base_common))) next

    message("[fit] outcome=", outcome, " | score=", score_col)

    df <- make_analysis_df(base_common, score_col)

    score_sd_raw <- sd(df$score, na.rm = TRUE)
    outcome_sd_raw <- sd(df$outcome_raw, na.rm = TRUE)

    if (!is.finite(score_sd_raw) || score_sd_raw <= 0) {
      warning("Skipping ", outcome, " x ", score_col, " because score is constant after strict id matching.")
      next
    }

    if (!is.finite(outcome_sd_raw) || outcome_sd_raw <= 0) {
      warning("Skipping ", outcome, " x ", score_col, " because outcome is constant after strict id matching.")
      next
    }

    forms <- build_forms(df)
    fit_res <- purrr::map(forms, ~ fit_one_model(.x, df))

    for (nm in names(fit_res)) {
      res <- fit_res[[nm]]
      score_model <- formula_has_score(nm)
      status_rows[[sidx]] <- tibble(
        outcome = outcome,
        score = score_col,
        model = nm,
        n = nrow(df),
        fit_ok = !is.null(res$fit),
        loo_ok = !is.null(res$loo) && inherits(res$loo, "loo"),
        score_model = score_model,
        score_coef_present = if (!is.null(res$fit) && score_model) model_has_score_coef(res$fit) else NA,
        error_message = res$error_message %||% NA_character_,
        loo_error_message = res$loo_error_message %||% NA_character_
      )
      sidx <- sidx + 1L
    }

    fit_res_fit_ok <- fit_res[purrr::map_lgl(fit_res, ~ !is.null(.x$fit))]
    fit_res_loo_ok <- fit_res_fit_ok[purrr::map_lgl(fit_res_fit_ok, ~ !is.null(.x$loo) && inherits(.x$loo, "loo"))]

    cmp_tbl <- compare_models(
      purrr::map(fit_res_loo_ok, "loo"),
      outcome = outcome,
      score_col = score_col
    )

    score_fit_names <- names(fit_res_fit_ok)[formula_has_score(names(fit_res_fit_ok))]
    eff_tbl <- if (length(score_fit_names) > 0) {
      purrr::imap_dfr(
        fit_res_fit_ok[score_fit_names],
        function(ft, nm) extract_score_effect(ft$fit, outcome, score_col, nm)
      )
    } else {
      empty_effect_tbl
    }

    pk_tbl <- summarize_pareto_k(
      purrr::map(fit_res_fit_ok, "pareto_k"),
      outcome = outcome,
      score_col = score_col,
      ids = df$id
    )

    all_comparisons[[paste(outcome, score_col, sep = "__")]] <- cmp_tbl
    all_effects[[paste(outcome, score_col, sep = "__")]] <- eff_tbl
    all_pareto[[paste(outcome, score_col, sep = "__")]] <- pk_tbl

    summary_rows[[idx]] <- tibble(
      outcome = outcome,
      score = score_col,
      n = nrow(df),
      n_models_attempted = length(forms),
      n_models_fit_ok = length(fit_res_fit_ok),
      n_models_loo_ok = length(fit_res_loo_ok),
      score_sd_raw = score_sd_raw,
      outcome_sd_raw = outcome_sd_raw,
      backend = backend_used,
      adapt_delta = 0.99,
      max_treedepth = 12
    )
    idx <- idx + 1L
  }
}

comparison_tbl <- bind_or_empty(all_comparisons, empty_comparison_tbl)
effects_tbl <- bind_or_empty(all_effects, empty_effect_tbl)
pareto_tbl <- bind_or_empty(all_pareto, empty_pareto_tbl)
summary_tbl <- bind_or_empty(summary_rows, empty_summary_tbl)
matching_tbl <- bind_or_empty(matching_rows, empty_matching_tbl)
model_status_tbl <- bind_or_empty(status_rows, empty_status_tbl)

readr::write_csv(comparison_tbl, file.path(tables_dir, "model_comparisons.csv"))
readr::write_csv(effects_tbl, file.path(tables_dir, "score_effects.csv"))
readr::write_csv(pareto_tbl, file.path(tables_dir, "pareto_k_summary.csv"))
readr::write_csv(summary_tbl, file.path(tables_dir, "run_summary.csv"))
readr::write_csv(matching_tbl, file.path(tables_dir, "matching_summary.csv"))
readr::write_csv(model_status_tbl, file.path(tables_dir, "model_status.csv"))

summary_tbl
matching_tbl
model_status_tbl %>%
  count(outcome, score, fit_ok, loo_ok, score_model, score_coef_present, name = "n_models")
```

### Plottong the model results. 
```{r}
# ============================================================
# Minimal, Publishable Performance & Effect Dashboard (Words)
# ============================================================

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(tidytext)
library(stringr)
library(ggdist)        
library(distributional) 

# --- Publishable Theme ---
theme_report <- function(base_size = 14) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size, base_family = "sans") +
    theme(
      text = element_text(color = "#222222"),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(), 
      panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "#E0E0E0", linewidth = 0.6),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", color = "#111111", size = base_size),
      axis.text.x = element_text(color = "#333333", size = base_size - 2),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size + 4, hjust = 0.5)
    )
}

# --- Labeling Functions ---
pretty_score <- function(x) {
  x |>
    stringr::str_remove("_aligned$") |>
    dplyr::recode(
      score_nb_logit = "NB",
      score_ridge_logit = "Elastic Net Logistic", # Updated label
      score_svm_logit = "SVM",
      score_xgb_logit = "XGB",
      score_lgb_logit = "LGBM",
      score_bert_logit = "Latin BERT",
      .default = x
    )
}

pretty_model <- function(x) {
  dplyr::recode(
    x,
    intercept = "Intercept",
    score = "Score only",
    date_type = "Date+Type",
    date_type_score = "Date+Type+Score",
    sdate_type = "SDate+Type",
    sdate_type_score = "SDate+Type+Score",
    source_date_type = "Src+Date+Type",
    source_date_type_score = "Src+Date+Type+Score",
    source_sdate_type = "Src+SDate+Type",
    source_sdate_type_score = "Src+SDate+Type+Score",
    creator_date_type = "Date+Type+Creator RE",
    creator_date_type_score = "Date+Type+Score+Creator RE",
    creator_sdate_type = "SDate+Type+Creator RE",
    creator_sdate_type_score = "SDate+Type+Score+Creator RE",
    source_creator_date_type = "Src+Date+Type+Creator RE",
    source_creator_date_type_score = "Src+Date+Type+Score+Creator RE",
    source_creator_sdate_type = "Src+SDate+Type+Creator RE",
    source_creator_sdate_type_score = "Src+SDate+Type+Score+Creator RE",
    .default = x
  )
}

# Updated levels vector
score_levels <- c("LGBM", "NB", "Elastic Net Logistic", "SVM", "XGB", "Latin BERT") 

predictor_slug <- function(x) stringr::str_replace_all(stringr::str_to_lower(x), "[^a-z0-9]+", "_")

# --- Data Preparation ---
cmp2 <- comparison_tbl %>%
  filter(outcome %in% c("n_words", "Words")) %>%
  mutate(
    score_label = factor(pretty_score(score), levels = score_levels),
    model_label = pretty_model(model),
    model_plot_label = stringr::str_wrap(model_label, width = 35)
  ) %>%
  group_by(score_label) %>%
  mutate(delta_looic = if (all(is.na(looic))) NA_real_ else looic - min(looic, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()

eff2 <- effects_tbl %>%
  filter(outcome %in% c("n_words", "Words")) %>%
  mutate(
    score_label = factor(pretty_score(score), levels = score_levels),
    model_label = pretty_model(model),
    model_plot_label = stringr::str_wrap(model_label, width = 35),
    includes_score = stringr::str_detect(model, "score"),
    effect_strength = case_when(
      prob_positive >= 0.975 ~ "Strong +",
      prob_positive >= 0.90 ~ "Moderate +",
      prob_positive <= 0.025 ~ "Strong -",
      prob_positive <= 0.10 ~ "Moderate -",
      TRUE ~ "Weak"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(includes_score, !is.na(estimate), score_coef_present)

plot_top_keys <- cmp2 %>%
  filter(!is.na(looic)) %>%
  group_by(score_label) %>%
  slice_min(looic, n = 8, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  distinct(score_label, model, model_plot_label)

cmp_plot <- cmp2 %>% semi_join(plot_top_keys, by = c("score_label", "model"))
eff_plot <- eff2 %>% semi_join(plot_top_keys, by = c("score_label", "model"))

# --- Vibrant Plotting Function ---
make_words_dashboard <- function(cmp_data, eff_data, predictor_value) {
  cmp_df <- cmp_data %>% filter(score_label == predictor_value)
  eff_df <- eff_data %>% filter(score_label == predictor_value)
  
  if (nrow(cmp_df) == 0 | nrow(eff_df) == 0) return(NULL)

  df_integrated <- cmp_df %>%
    inner_join(eff_df %>% select(model, estimate, est_error, effect_strength), by = "model") %>%
    mutate(model_plot = reorder(model_plot_label, -delta_looic))

  # Plot A: Vibrant Lollipops (Turbo Palette)
  p_loo <- ggplot(df_integrated, aes(x = delta_looic, y = model_plot, color = delta_looic)) +
    geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = delta_looic, yend = model_plot), linewidth = 2, alpha = 0.9) +
    geom_point(size = 6) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 2, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1.2, color = "#D50000") +
    tidytext::scale_y_reordered() +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "turbo", direction = -1, guide = "none") +
    labs(
      title = expression("Model Fit (" * Delta * " LOOIC)"),
      x = expression(Delta * " LOOIC (vs Best)"),
      y = NULL
    ) +
    theme_report()

  # Plot B: Bold Density Estimates
  p_eff <- ggplot(df_integrated, aes(y = model_plot)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", linewidth = 1.2, color = "#222222") +
    ggdist::stat_dist_halfeye(
      aes(dist = distributional::dist_normal(estimate, est_error), fill = effect_strength),
      alpha = 0.95, point_color = "black", interval_color = "black",
      slab_linewidth = 0.8, linewidth = 2, justification = -0.1
    ) +
    tidytext::scale_y_reordered() +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = c("Strong +" = "#00E676", "Moderate +" = "#69F0AE", "Weak" = "#CFD8DC", "Moderate -" = "#FF9100", "Strong -" = "#FF1744"),
      breaks = c("Strong -", "Moderate -", "Weak", "Moderate +", "Strong +")
    ) +
    labs(
      title = "Adjusted Score Effect",
      x = "Standardized Effect",
      y = NULL,
      fill = "Support"
    ) +
    theme_report() +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_blank())

  # Seamless Integration
  dashboard <- (p_loo | p_eff) +
    plot_annotation(
      title = predictor_value,
      theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
    ) +
    plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1.2))

  return(dashboard)
}

# --- Execution ---
for (pred_value in score_levels) {
  slug <- predictor_slug(pred_value)
  integrated_dashboard <- make_words_dashboard(cmp_plot, eff_plot, pred_value)
  
  if (!is.null(integrated_dashboard)) {
    ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, paste0("dashboard_words_pred_", slug, ".png")), 
           integrated_dashboard, width = 16, height = 9, dpi = 300)
    print(integrated_dashboard)
  }
}
```

## Correlations in the corpus

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Beautiful Visualizations: Label, n_words, and text type
# ============================================================
# Required libraries (assuming tidyverse, scales, patchwork already loaded)
library(ggdist)   
library(viridis)

# 1. Prepare the subset of data for visualization
plot_dat <- dat %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(manual_label_clean),
    is.finite(n_words),
    n_words > 0,
    !is.na(type),
    type != "Unknown"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # Create clear factors for plotting
    label_factor = factor(
      manual_label_clean, 
      levels = c("non_christian", "christian"), 
      labels = c("Non-Christian", "Christian")
    ),
    binary_christian = if_else(manual_label_clean == "christian", 1, 0),
    # Log-transform word counts for better distribution visibility
    log_words = log10(n_words) 
  ) %>%
  # Filter to text types that have enough observations to plot cleanly (e.g., n >= 10)
  add_count(type, name = "type_count") %>%
  filter(type_count >= 10) %>%
  # Reorder text type by median word count for a neat staggered look
  mutate(type = forcats::fct_reorder(type, log_words, .fun = median))

# Upgraded visual theme
theme_beautiful <- function(base_size = 14) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size, base_family = "sans") +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size + 4, color = "#1A2421"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "#4A5553", margin = margin(b = 15)),
      plot.caption = element_text(color = "#889290", size = base_size - 4, margin = margin(t = 15)),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "#E2E8E5", linewidth = 0.5),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "#E2E8E5", linewidth = 0.5, linetype = "dotted"),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size, color = "#2C3E50"),
      legend.position = "top",
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
    )
}
```

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Plot A: Raincloud / Density plot of n_words by Type & Label
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Plot A: Raincloud / Density plot of n_words by Type & Label
# ------------------------------------------------------------
p_density <- ggplot(plot_dat, aes(x = log_words, y = type, fill = label_factor, color = label_factor)) +
  stat_halfeye(
    adjust = 0.5, 
    width = 0.6, 
    .width = c(0.5, 0.95), 
    justification = -0.2, 
    point_colour = NA,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +
  geom_jitter(
    aes(y = as.numeric(type) - 0.15),
    height = 0.05,
    size = 1.2,
    alpha = 0.3,
    shape = 21,
    stroke = 0.2
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Non-Christian" = "#E67E22", "Christian" = "#2980B9")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Non-Christian" = "#D35400", "Christian" = "#21618C")) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    labels = function(x) math_format(10^.x)(x),
    breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(n = 5)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Word Count Distributions",
    x = "Words",
    y = NULL,
    fill = "Label",
    color = "Label"
  ) +
  theme_beautiful()

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Plot B: Logistic Regression Curve (Probability ~ n_words)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
p_prob <- ggplot(plot_dat, aes(x = log_words, y = binary_christian, color = type)) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0.03, alpha = 0.2, size = 1.5) +
  geom_smooth(
    method = "glm", 
    method.args = list(family = "binomial"), 
    se = FALSE, 
    linewidth = 1.2,
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_smooth(
    method = "glm", 
    method.args = list(family = "binomial"), 
    se = TRUE, 
    color = "black", 
    linewidth = 1.5,
    linetype = "dashed",
    fill = "grey50",
    alpha = 0.2
  ) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "turbo") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    labels = function(x) math_format(10^.x)(x),
    breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(n = 5)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  labs(
    title = "Probability of 'Christian' Label",
    x = "Words",
    y = "Probability",
    color = "Type"
  ) +
  theme_beautiful()

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Combine using patchwork
# ------------------------------------------------------------
final_visualization <- (p_density / p_prob) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1.5, 1)) +
  plot_annotation(
    theme = theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#FAFAFA", color = NA))
  )

print(final_visualization)



# Save the plot
save_plot_obj(final_visualization, "label_wordcount_type_correlation.png", width = 16, height = 14)

```

## Fitting the text-type models 

```{r}
# ============================================================
# System / backend setup
# ============================================================
Sys.setenv(OMP_NUM_THREADS = "1")
Sys.setenv(OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS = "1")
Sys.setenv(MKL_NUM_THREADS = "1")
Sys.setenv(STAN_NUM_THREADS = "1")
Sys.setenv(MC_CORES = "1")
Sys.setenv(MAKEFLAGS = "-j1")

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(brms)
  library(loo)
  library(scales)
  library(patchwork)
  library(tidytext)
  library(ggdist)
  library(distributional)
  library(viridis)
})

options(mc.cores = 1)
`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x)) y else x

# ============================================================
# Helpers
# ============================================================
ensure_dir <- function(path) { dir.create(path, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE); path }
safe_string <- function(x, missing = "Unknown") { x <- as.character(x); x[is.na(x) | !nzchar(trimws(x))] <- missing; x }
safe_standardize <- function(x) { x <- as.numeric(x); s <- stats::sd(x, na.rm = TRUE); m <- mean(x, na.rm = TRUE); if (!is.finite(s) || s <= 0) return(rep(0, length(x))); (x - m) / s }

make_formula <- function(rhs_terms = character(), random_term = NULL) {
  rhs_terms <- rhs_terms[!is.na(rhs_terms) & nzchar(rhs_terms)]
  if (!is.null(random_term) && nzchar(random_term)) rhs_terms <- c(rhs_terms, random_term)
  rhs <- if (length(rhs_terms) == 0) "1" else paste(rhs_terms, collapse = " + ")
  brms::bf(stats::as.formula(paste("y ~", rhs)))
}

formula_has_score <- function(model_name) { stringr::str_detect(model_name, "score") }

choose_backend <- function() {
  if (!requireNamespace("cmdstanr", quietly = TRUE)) { options(brms.backend = "rstan"); return("rstan") }
  ok <- tryCatch({
    p <- cmdstanr::cmdstan_path()
    if (!nzchar(p)) return(FALSE)
    tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".stan")
    writeLines(c("data {int<lower=0> N; vector[N] y;}", "parameters {real mu; real<lower=0> sigma;}", "model {y ~ normal(mu, sigma);}"), tmp)
    inherits(cmdstanr::cmdstan_model(tmp, quiet = TRUE), "CmdStanModel")
  }, error = function(e) FALSE)
  
  if (isTRUE(ok)) { options(brms.backend = "cmdstanr"); "cmdstanr" } else { options(brms.backend = "rstan"); "rstan" }
}

# ============================================================
# Configuration & Tables
# ============================================================
score_levels <- c("LightGBM", "Naive Bayes", "Ridge", "SVM", "XGBoost", "Latin BERT")
outcome_levels <- c("Text Type")

pretty_outcome <- function(x) { dplyr::recode(x, type = "Text Type", .default = x) }
pretty_score <- function(x) {
  x |> stringr::str_remove("_aligned$") |> dplyr::recode(
    score_nb_logit = "Naive Bayes", score_ridge_logit = "Elastic Net", score_svm_logit = "SVM",
    score_xgb_logit = "XGBoost", score_lgb_logit = "LightGBM", score_bert_logit = "Latin BERT", .default = x
  )
}

pretty_model <- function(x) {
  dplyr::recode(
    x,
    intercept = "Intercept",
    score = "Score only",
    date = "Date",
    date_score = "Date + score",
    sdate = "Smooth date",
    sdate_score = "Smooth date + score",
    source_date = "Prediction source + date",
    source_date_score = "Prediction source + date + score",
    source_sdate = "Prediction source + smooth date",
    source_sdate_score = "Prediction source + smooth date + score",
    creator_date = "Date + creator RE",
    creator_date_score = "Date + score + creator RE",
    creator_sdate = "Smooth date + creator RE",
    creator_sdate_score = "Smooth date + score + creator RE",
    source_creator_date = "Prediction source + date + creator RE",
    source_creator_date_score = "Prediction source + date + score + creator RE",
    source_creator_sdate = "Prediction source + smooth date + creator RE",
    source_creator_sdate_score = "Prediction source + smooth date + score + creator RE",
    .default = x
  )
}

# ============================================================
# Core Functions
# ============================================================
make_outcome_base_df <- function(dat, score_cols_aligned) {
  dat %>%
    transmute(
      id = as.character(id),
      outcome_raw = safe_string(type, "Unknown"),
      date_mid = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(date_mid)),
      creator = safe_string(creator, "Unknown"),
      prediction_source = safe_string(prediction_source, "Unknown"),
      across(all_of(score_cols_aligned), ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.x)))
    ) %>%
    distinct(id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    filter(outcome_raw != "Unknown", is.finite(date_mid))
}

make_analysis_df <- function(base_df, score_col) {
  base_df %>%
    transmute(
      id = as.character(id),
      score = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[[score_col]])),
      outcome_raw = droplevels(factor(outcome_raw)),
      date_mid = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(date_mid)),
      creator = droplevels(factor(safe_string(creator, "Unknown"))),
      prediction_source = droplevels(factor(safe_string(prediction_source, "Unknown")))
    ) %>%
    filter(is.finite(score), is.finite(date_mid)) %>%
    mutate(
      y = outcome_raw,
      score_std = safe_standardize(score),
      date_mid_z = safe_standardize(date_mid)
    )
}

build_forms <- function(df) {
  include_source <- dplyr::n_distinct(df$prediction_source) >= 2
  creator_tab <- table(df$creator)
  include_creator <- dplyr::n_distinct(df$creator) >= 3 && any(creator_tab >= 2)
  n_unique_dates <- dplyr::n_distinct(df$date_mid_z)
  include_linear_date <- n_unique_dates >= 2
  include_smooth_date <- n_unique_dates >= 5
  k_smooth <- max(3L, min(6L, n_unique_dates - 1L))

  source_term <- if (include_source) "prediction_source" else NULL
  creator_term <- if (include_creator) "(1 | creator)" else NULL
  linear_date_term <- if (include_linear_date) "date_mid_z" else NULL
  smooth_date_term <- if (include_smooth_date) paste0("s(date_mid_z, k = ", k_smooth, ")") else NULL

  forms <- list(
    intercept = make_formula(),
    score = make_formula("score_std"),
    date = make_formula(linear_date_term),
    date_score = make_formula(c(linear_date_term, "score_std"))
  )

  if (!is.null(smooth_date_term)) {
    forms$sdate <- make_formula(smooth_date_term)
    forms$sdate_score <- make_formula(c(smooth_date_term, "score_std"))
  }

  if (!is.null(source_term)) {
    forms$source_date <- make_formula(c(source_term, linear_date_term))
    forms$source_date_score <- make_formula(c(source_term, linear_date_term, "score_std"))
    if (!is.null(smooth_date_term)) {
      forms$source_sdate <- make_formula(c(source_term, smooth_date_term))
      forms$source_sdate_score <- make_formula(c(source_term, smooth_date_term, "score_std"))
    }
  }

  if (!is.null(creator_term)) {
    forms$creator_date <- make_formula(linear_date_term, creator_term)
    forms$creator_date_score <- make_formula(c(linear_date_term, "score_std"), creator_term)
    if (!is.null(smooth_date_term)) {
      forms$creator_sdate <- make_formula(smooth_date_term, creator_term)
      forms$creator_sdate_score <- make_formula(c(smooth_date_term, "score_std"), creator_term)
    }
  }

  if (!is.null(source_term) && !is.null(creator_term)) {
    forms$source_creator_date <- make_formula(c(source_term, linear_date_term), creator_term)
    forms$source_creator_date_score <- make_formula(c(source_term, linear_date_term, "score_std"), creator_term)
    if (!is.null(smooth_date_term)) {
      forms$source_creator_sdate <- make_formula(c(source_term, smooth_date_term), creator_term)
      forms$source_creator_sdate_score <- make_formula(c(source_term, smooth_date_term, "score_std"), creator_term)
    }
  }
  forms
}

get_priors_for_formula <- function(formula_obj) {
  f <- formula_obj$formula
  tl <- attr(stats::terms(f), "term.labels")

  pri <- c(brms::prior(student_t(3, 0, 2.5), class = "Intercept"))
  fixed_terms <- tl[!grepl("^s\\(", tl) & !grepl("\\|", tl)]
  if (length(fixed_terms) > 0) pri <- c(pri, brms::prior(normal(0, 1), class = "b"))
  if (any(grepl("^s\\(", tl))) pri <- c(pri, brms::prior(exponential(1), class = "sds"))
  if (any(grepl("\\|", tl))) pri <- c(pri, brms::prior(exponential(1), class = "sd"))
  pri
}

# ============================================================
# Updated Fitting Function (No custom priors for categorical)
# ============================================================

fit_one_model <- function(formula_obj, data) {
  # Dynamically choose family based on number of text types
  n_cats <- dplyr::n_distinct(data$y)
  model_family <- if (n_cats == 2) bernoulli() else categorical()

  common_args <- list(
    formula = formula_obj, 
    data = data, 
    family = model_family, 
    chains = 2, 
    cores = 1, 
    iter = 2000, 
    warmup = 1000, 
    seed = 1234, 
    refresh = 0,
    save_pars = brms::save_pars(all = TRUE), 
    control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99, max_treedepth = 12)
  )

  fit <- tryCatch({
    if (identical(getOption("brms.backend"), "cmdstanr")) {
      do.call(brms::brm, c(common_args, list(backend = "cmdstanr", threads = brms::threading(1), silent = 2)))
    } else { 
      do.call(brms::brm, c(common_args, list(backend = "rstan", init = 0))) 
    }
  }, error = function(e) e)

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) return(list(fit = NULL, loo = NULL, error_message = conditionMessage(fit)))
  
  loo_res <- tryCatch(suppressWarnings(brms::loo(fit, cores = 1)), error = function(e) e)
  if (inherits(loo_res, "error")) return(list(fit = fit, loo = NULL, error_message = conditionMessage(loo_res)))
  
  list(fit = fit, loo = loo_res, error_message = NA_character_)
}

extract_score_effect <- function(fit, outcome, score_col, model_name) {
  fe <- tryCatch(brms::fixef(fit), error = function(e) NULL)
  coef_names <- rownames(fe)
  score_coefs <- coef_names[grepl("score_std$", coef_names)]
  
  if (length(score_coefs) == 0) {
    return(tibble(outcome = outcome, score = score_col, model = model_name, category = NA_character_, estimate = NA_real_, est_error = NA_real_, l95 = NA_real_, u95 = NA_real_, prob_positive = NA_real_, score_coef_present = FALSE))
  }
  
  draws <- tryCatch(as.data.frame(brms::as_draws_df(fit)), error = function(e) NULL)
  
  purrr::map_dfr(score_coefs, function(sc) {
    cat_name <- stringr::str_match(sc, "^mu(.*)_score_std$")[, 2]
    if (is.na(cat_name)) cat_name <- "Base"
    draw_col <- paste0("b_", sc)
    prob_positive <- if (!is.null(draws) && draw_col %in% names(draws)) mean(draws[[draw_col]] > 0) else NA_real_
    
    tibble(
      outcome = outcome, score = score_col, model = model_name, category = cat_name,
      estimate = unname(fe[sc, "Estimate"]), est_error = unname(fe[sc, "Est.Error"]),
      l95 = unname(fe[sc, "Q2.5"]), u95 = unname(fe[sc, "Q97.5"]),
      prob_positive = prob_positive, score_coef_present = TRUE
    )
  })
}

# ============================================================
# Execution Loop
# ============================================================
# ============================================================
# Safe Extractors & Robust Execution Loop
# ============================================================

# Safe extractor for LOO metrics
get_loo_est <- function(l, metric, col) {
  if (is.null(l) || !inherits(l, "loo") || !metric %in% rownames(l$estimates)) return(NA_real_)
  l$estimates[metric, col]
}

backend_used <- choose_backend()
outcome_base <- make_outcome_base_df(dat, score_cols_aligned)
common_ids <- outcome_base %>% filter(if_all(all_of(score_cols_aligned), is.finite)) %>% pull(id)
base_common <- outcome_base %>% filter(id %in% common_ids) %>% distinct(id, .keep_all = TRUE)

all_comparisons <- list()
all_effects <- list()

for (score_col in score_cols_aligned) {
  message("\n[fit] outcome=type | score=", score_col)
  df <- make_analysis_df(base_common, score_col)
  
  if (dplyr::n_distinct(df$y) < 2) {
    message("  -> Skipping: Fewer than 2 text types present for this score.")
    next 
  }

  forms <- build_forms(df)
  fit_res <- purrr::map(forms, ~ fit_one_model(.x, df))
  
  # Print any underlying Stan errors to the console so we know what is failing
  purrr::iwalk(fit_res, function(res, name) {
    if (!is.na(res$error_message)) {
      message("  -> Model '", name, "' failed to fit: ", res$error_message)
    }
  })
  
  fit_res_fit_ok <- fit_res[purrr::map_lgl(fit_res, ~ !is.null(.x$fit))]
  fit_res_loo_ok <- fit_res_fit_ok[purrr::map_lgl(fit_res_fit_ok, ~ !is.null(.x$loo))]
  
  # 1. Safely Compare Models
  if (length(fit_res_loo_ok) > 0) {
    nm <- names(fit_res_loo_ok)
    loos <- purrr::map(fit_res_loo_ok, "loo")
    
    cmp_tbl <- tibble(
      outcome = "type", score = score_col, model = nm,
      elpd_loo = purrr::map_dbl(loos, ~ get_loo_est(.x, "elpd_loo", "Estimate")),
      elpd_loo_se = purrr::map_dbl(loos, ~ get_loo_est(.x, "elpd_loo", "SE")),
      looic = purrr::map_dbl(loos, ~ get_loo_est(.x, "looic", "Estimate"))
    ) %>%
      arrange(looic) %>%
      mutate(
        delta_looic = if (all(is.na(looic))) NA_real_ else looic - min(looic, na.rm = TRUE),
        rank = row_number()
      )
  } else {
    cmp_tbl <- tibble(outcome = character(), score = character(), model = character(), 
                      elpd_loo = numeric(), elpd_loo_se = numeric(), looic = numeric(), 
                      delta_looic = numeric(), rank = integer())
  }
    
  # 2. Safely Extract Effects
  score_fit_names <- names(fit_res_fit_ok)[formula_has_score(names(fit_res_fit_ok))]
  
  if (length(score_fit_names) > 0) {
    eff_tbl <- purrr::imap_dfr(fit_res_fit_ok[score_fit_names], function(ft, mnm) {
      extract_score_effect(ft$fit, "type", score_col, mnm)
    })
  } else {
    eff_tbl <- tibble(outcome = character(), score = character(), model = character(), 
                      category = character(), estimate = numeric(), est_error = numeric(), 
                      l95 = numeric(), u95 = numeric(), prob_positive = numeric(), 
                      score_coef_present = logical())
  }

  all_comparisons[[score_col]] <- cmp_tbl
  all_effects[[score_col]] <- eff_tbl
}

# Safely bind rows and format data
cmp2 <- bind_rows(all_comparisons)
if (nrow(cmp2) > 0) {
  cmp2 <- cmp2 %>% 
    mutate(
      score_label = pretty_score(score), 
      model_label = pretty_model(model), 
      model_plot_label = stringr::str_wrap(model_label, width = 35)
    )
}

eff2 <- bind_rows(all_effects)
if (nrow(eff2) > 0) {
  eff2 <- eff2 %>% 
    mutate(
      score_label = pretty_score(score), 
      model_label = pretty_model(model), 
      model_plot_label = stringr::str_wrap(model_label, width = 35), 
      effect_strength = case_when(
        prob_positive >= 0.975 ~ "Strong +", 
        prob_positive >= 0.90 ~ "Moderate +", 
        prob_positive <= 0.025 ~ "Strong -", 
        prob_positive <= 0.10 ~ "Moderate -", 
        TRUE ~ "Weak"
      ),
      score_model_order = as.integer(factor(model))
    )
}

```
 

### Plotting

```{r}
theme_report <- function(base_size = 13) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size, base_family = "sans") +
    theme(
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey90", linewidth = 0.2, linetype = "dotted"),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "grey85", linewidth = 0.4),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#FAFAFA", color = NA),
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size + 1, color = "white"),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#2C3E50", color = NA),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
}

make_loo_plot <- function(data, predictor_value) {
  if (nrow(data) == 0) return(NULL)
  df <- data %>% filter(score_label == predictor_value, !is.na(delta_looic))
  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)

  df <- df %>% mutate(model_plot = tidytext::reorder_within(model_plot_label, -delta_looic, score_label))

  ggplot(df, aes(x = delta_looic, y = model_plot, color = delta_looic)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 2, linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.8, color = "#E74C3C") +
    geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = delta_looic, yend = model_plot), linewidth = 1.2, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_point(size = 4) +
    tidytext::scale_y_reordered() +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma", direction = -1, guide = "none") +
    labs(title = paste("LOOIC vs Best | Predictor:", predictor_value), x = expression(Delta * " LOOIC"), y = "Model") +
    theme_report()
}

make_effect_density_plot <- function(data, predictor_value) {
  if (nrow(data) == 0) return(NULL)
  df <- data %>% filter(score_label == predictor_value, !is.na(estimate))
  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)

  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      panel_id = paste("Type:", category),
      model_plot = tidytext::reorder_within(model_plot_label, -score_model_order, panel_id)
    )

  ggplot(df, aes(y = model_plot)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8, color = "#E74C3C") +
    ggdist::stat_dist_halfeye(
      aes(dist = distributional::dist_normal(estimate, est_error), fill = effect_strength),
      alpha = 0.85, justification = -0.1
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~ panel_id, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
    tidytext::scale_y_reordered() +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = c("Strong +" = "#2ECC71", "Moderate +" = "#A9DFBF", "Weak" = "#BDC3C7", "Moderate -" = "#F5B041", "Strong -" = "#E74C3C"),
      breaks = c("Strong -", "Moderate -", "Weak", "Moderate +", "Strong +")
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Effects on Text Type Categories | Predictor:", predictor_value),
      x = "Standardized Score Effect", y = "Model", fill = "Posterior Support"
    ) +
    theme_report()
}

fig_dir <- "../../results/predictions/non_transformer_lemmatized/600ad/negative_control/report/figures"
dir.create(fig_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

clean_name <- function(x) {
  x |>
    tolower() |>
    gsub("[^a-z0-9]+", "_", x = _) |>
    gsub("^_|_$", "", x = _)
}

if (nrow(cmp2) > 0 && nrow(eff2) > 0) {
  for (pred_value in unique(cmp2$score_label)) {
    p_loo <- make_loo_plot(cmp2, pred_value)
    p_eff <- make_effect_density_plot(eff2, pred_value)
    pred_stub <- clean_name(pred_value)

    if (!is.null(p_loo)) {
      ggsave(
        filename = file.path(fig_dir, paste0("looic_", pred_stub, ".png")),
        plot = p_loo, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300, bg = "white"
      )
    }

    if (!is.null(p_eff)) {
      ggsave(
        filename = file.path(fig_dir, paste0("effects_", pred_stub, ".png")),
        plot = p_eff, width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300, bg = "white"
      )
    }

    if (!is.null(p_loo) && !is.null(p_eff)) {
      combined <- p_loo / p_eff + plot_layout(heights = c(1, 2))
      print(combined)
      ggsave(
        filename = file.path(fig_dir, paste0("combined_", pred_stub, ".png")),
        plot = combined, width = 12, height = 14, dpi = 300, bg = "white"
      )
    } else if (!is.null(p_eff)) {
      print(p_eff)
    }
  }
} else {
  message("No valid models were produced. Skipping plotting step.")
}
```
